title: fordia stipularis
intro: Fordia stipularis, also known as the Fordia tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to China and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Fordia stipularis lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Fordia stipularis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparation of Fordia stipularis is often made into a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
